docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF DOLLINGER & DOLLINGER AS TO DEFENDANT GREENBLATT-BLOCKEY-SHIDLER

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DOLLINGER & DOLLINGER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GREENBLATT-BLOCKEY-SHIDLER $11,147.33 PRINCIPAL, $2,985.95 INTEREST, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $14,213.28 ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER STATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DOLLINGER & DOLLINGER

PROOF OF SERVICE OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER STATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DOLLINGER & DOLLINGER SERVED AUG-24-1994, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT GREENBLATT-BLOCKEY-SHIDLER
PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION. WRIT MAY ISSUE ON 04-OCT-94
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF DOLLINGER & DOLLINGER
